description: Offline semantic retrieval checks: mock embeddings are one-hot by pill axis; query_axis picks the matching unit vector.

pills.title: Docker Layer Caching
pills.content: Docker images use layer caching; order Dockerfile instructions for cache hits.

pills.title: Python GIL and Concurrency
pills.content: The GIL affects CPU-bound threading; use multiprocessing for parallelism.

pills.title: MCP – Model Context Protocol Basics
pills.content: MCP exposes tools and resources to AI clients such as Cursor.

pills.title: MongoDB TTL Indexes
pills.content: TTL indexes expire documents after expireAfterSeconds.

pills.title: Plan-Execute-Observe Loop
pills.content: Agent loop: plan, act, observe; used in autonomous tooling.

pills.title: Idempotency Keys for Ingest
pills.content: POST ingest supports Idempotency-Key to safely retry identical bodies.

pills.title: Semantic Search over Pills
pills.content: Vector cosine similarity ranks active pills for natural language queries.

pills.title: Graph Neighbors and Relations
pills.content: Pills link via relations array with target_id and kind for graph-aware retrieval.

pills.title: Janitor Consolidation
pills.content: Janitor detects contradictions and can merge or add conflicts_with edges.

pills.title: API Key Authentication
pills.content: Optional Bearer token or X-API-Key protects routes when OPENPILL_API_KEY is set.

pills.title: Conflict Relations Between Pills
pills.content: conflicts_with edges mark contradictory memories for review.

pills.title: Long-Term Fact Extraction
pills.content: Extractor turns transcripts into atomic knowledge pills with confidence.

pills.title: Hybrid Retrieval Fusion
pills.content: Optional hybrid mode blends vector similarity with lexical text search.

pills.title: Categories and Topic Snapshots
pills.content: REST endpoints expose category lists and topic aggregates for dashboards.

pills.title: Watchdog and Change Streams
pills.content: Replica-set change streams drive watchdog linking for new pills.

pills.title: Updated Janitor Guidance
pills.content: Newer operational note that supersedes the janitor consolidation pill.
